name: Mayank
title: Technical Lead – Android
summary: Lead Android Engineer with 8+ years of experience building and scaling high-performance Android applications. Expertise in clean architecture, offline-first design, Kotlin-based development, and delivering scalable, resilient mobile experiences with a strong focus on code quality, performance, and user impact.

experience.description: Zupee is a leading casual real money gaming company focused on fun and interactive gaming experiences.
bullets: Led parallel Android initiatives, managing a dedicated team of 3 engineers and owning delivery of high-revenue game modules and core platform features end-to-end.
Served as the primary reviewer for all major pull requests due to deep app-wide context, helping maintain architectural consistency, code quality, and engineering standards across teams.
Collaborated with product, design, and backend teams to define implementation strategy, delivery sequencing, and rollout plans.
Reduced 3TTO baseline from ~1.67% to ~1.34% among paid games by removing gameplay startup dependency on main socket events.

Led a full app rewrite for the platform's first major brand campaign, transitioning from monolithic to modular, component-based architecture with a phased rollout to 100% traffic at 99.92% crash-free stability.
Redesigned tournament architecture with client-side caching and data separation, reducing API load by 70% across high-traffic flows serving 1M+ DAUs.
Transitioned the app toward an offline-first architecture by reducing main-socket dependency, enabling graceful offline behavior and faster socket reconnection.
Improved system resilience during downtime by eliminating socket reconnection spikes, preventing backend overload during high-concurrency recovery scenarios.
Monitored production using Crashlytics, New Relic, and logging frameworks enabling rapid debugging and data-driven decision making.
Built scalable rollout systems using feature flags, A/B testing, and backward-compatible flows.
Owned and executed a full-scale transformation of a quiz app into an animation-heavy, gamified UX as the sole Android developer.
Built Kotlin and Java-based Android features with a strong focus on UI, UX, and performance. Participated in system design, monitored, and resolved production issues.

experience.description: Cliffjumper was an e-commerce company dedicated to crafting a unique shopping experience.
bullets: Developed Android interfaces and e-commerce features including product listing, cart, order creation, payments, and order tracking.
Integrated REST APIs, Realm Database, Push Notifications, Deeplinks. Improved app stability through debugging and bug resolution.

achievements.title: From Seed to Unicorn
achievements.description: Helped scale a small app into a multi-module platform serving 2M+ DAUs through architectural and reliability improvements.

achievements.title: Full-App Rewrite
achievements.description: Led a full app rewrite adopting a new UI theme, modern architecture, SOLID principles, and complete Kotlin migration.

achievements.title: End-to-End Ownership
achievements.description: Architected and scaled core app lifecycle systems — managing platform features and high-revenue game modules end-to-end.

achievements.title: Co-founded Brain Battle
achievements.description: Created and sold a free-to-play multiplayer gaming platform to a European startup.

achievements.title: 2× Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: Won a bug-bounty hackathon (team of 3) and built an AI-based platform navigation tool (team of 4).
